pdf.head:
<#if .locale == "zh_CN">
        
    <#elseif .locale == "zh_TW">
        
    <#elseif .locale == "ja_JP">
        
    <#elseif .locale == "ko_KR">
        
    <#elseif .locale == "th_TH">
        
    </#if>
    
        
            

    
      

        <#if companyInformation.logoUrl?length != 0><@filecabinet nstype="image" src="${companyInformation.logoUrl}" style="float: left; margin: 5px" width="120" height="40"/> </#if>
        ${companyInformation.addressText}
      
      
    
    Entrega de Mercancía
    
    

    #${record.tranid}
    
    

    Almacén: ${record.createdfrom.location}
    
    

    ${record.createdfrom}
    
    <#assign horaActual = .now>
    

    Fecha y hora: ${record.datetoday} ${horaActual?string("HH:mm:ss")}
    
    
          
        
        
  
    

      
        
      
      
         of
